title: Ruehssia haitiensis
taxonomy: Ruehssia haitiensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is a member of the genus Ruehssia, which is a group of flowering plants native to Haiti. The Annonaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as custard apples or soursops. The classification of Ruehssia haitiensis is further supported by its characteristics and morphology, which are typical of the Annonaceae family. Further research on this species would be necessary to confirm its classification with certainty.
